title: Metabolomics Biomarkers: A Strategy Toward Therapeutics Improvement in ALS.
author: Lanznaster D de Assis DR Corcia P Pradat PF Blasco H
content: S-EPMC6305341 PMC6305341 Metabolomics Biomarkers: A Strategy Toward Therapeutics Improvement in ALS. Biomarkers research in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) holds the promise of improving ALS diagnosis, follow-up of patients, and clinical trials outcomes. Metabolomics have a big impact
